explanation: TeamMessi excelled in persuasiveness through emotionally resonant arguments (e.g., 2022 World Cup legacy) and consistent citation of tournament-specific stats. Both debaters used credible sources, but TeamMessi's focus on Messi's unique combination of individual honors (8 Ballon d'Ors) and team success (World Cup) created stronger rhetorical force. TeamRonaldo's statistical emphasis and longevity arguments were robust but less impactful than Messi's narrative of global legacy.

factcheck_flags.issue: Unverified claim; no specific 3-hour regimen cited in Sports Illustrated archives
